title: EU MiCA Regulation
description: The EU enforces Markets in Crypto-Assets regulation. All EU-based crypto businesses need CASP licenses. Compliance costs rise.

title: UAE Crypto Hub Expansion
description: Dubai announces new crypto free zone benefits. Setup costs drop and more licenses available.

title: Paraguay Joins CRS
description: Paraguay begins Common Reporting Standard exchanges. Financial privacy advantage diminished.

title: Thailand Extends Tax Holiday
description: Thailand extends the crypto tax holiday to 2032. Great news for Thailand tax residents!

title: Singapore Tightens Entry
description: Singapore raises minimum investment for EntrePass. Premium jurisdiction gets more exclusive.

title: El Salvador Bitcoin Boom
description: BTC hits new all-time high. El Salvador's Bitcoin reserves generate surplus. Tax residents get a dividend.

effect.message: El Salvador tax residents get $8,000 BTC dividend

title: Global Tax Crackdown
description: OECD pushes new Crypto-Asset Reporting Framework (CARF). Countries with low privacy scores unaffected, others face scrutiny.

title: Georgia EU Candidate Status
description: Georgia gets EU candidate status. Property values and business interest surge. Costs rise but safety improves.

title: Hong Kong DeFi Regulations
description: Hong Kong introduces mandatory DeFi protocol registration. Business costs increase but legitimacy rises.

title: Network State Recognition
description: A digital jurisdiction gets diplomatic recognition. Players with 3+ flags in different countries get a sovereignty bonus.
